title: APSMP
description: This modpack contains 40+ mods that will enhance the Vanilla experience. This pack can also be used on vanilla Minecraft servers with no issue. - Specifically created for the apsmp.com server.
body:
# APSMP

This modpack contains 40+ mods that will enhance the Vanilla experience. This pack can also be used on vanilla Minecraft servers with no issue. - Specifically created for the [mc.apsmp.com](https://apsmp.com/) server.

Please support the creators of all of these mods, no mods in this pack are created by anyone affiliated with the APSMP server.

# Please Note

Due to copyright, a mod cannot be included in the pack and must be downloaded manually and then loaded into the pack. [Physics Mod](https://minecraftphysicsmod.com/download) (Version 3.0.19, for Fabric 1.21.0)

This mod is **NOT** required for the pack to function, however it is recommended to be added.

# Licensing 

Below are attributions to resources that require them.
